courses.title: Claude Managed Agents: Fundamentals
courses.description: Master the four core primitives — Agent, Environment, Session, Events — and understand why the decoupled architecture gives you 90%+ latency improvements over self-built loops.

courses.title: Core API Mastery: Agents, Environments, Sessions
courses.description: Deep dive into every API endpoint — create versioned agents, configure container environments with package caching, stream session events with full SSE handling, and master mid-session steering.

courses.title: Built-in Tools: bash, read, write, grep, web_search
courses.description: Leverage the full agent_toolset_20260401 — configure allowlists, disable tools for security, understand when each tool is appropriate, and build agents that use the filesystem and web effectively.

courses.title: Custom Tools & MCP Integration
courses.description: Build high-performing custom tools: write detailed descriptions that maximize model performance, consolidate operations, handle tool results in your stream, and connect MCP servers for GitHub, databases, and more.

courses.title: Multi-Agent Coordination Patterns
courses.description: Architect orchestrator/subagent systems — declare callable agents, stream multi-threaded sessions, handle thread events, and design delegation patterns for code review, testing, and research workflows.

courses.title: Security & Production Patterns
courses.description: Production-grade agent deployment: least-privilege networking, the secure vault pattern, credential handling, prompt injection defense, spend limits, and the complete production checklist.

courses.title: Environments & Container Configuration
courses.description: Configure cloud containers from scratch — pre-install packages across 6 package managers, set networking modes (unrestricted vs. limited), manage environment lifecycle, and optimise package caching across sessions.

courses.title: Claude Architect Certification: Exam Prep
courses.description: Complete preparation for the Claude Certified Architect exam — covers all 7 modules, 25 practice questions with explanations, the practical implementation task, and scoring rubric.

courses.title: Agent Observability & Debugging
courses.description: Use the Claude Console for session tracing, interpret every event type, debug failed tool calls, handle session.status_error gracefully, and build production logging pipelines for agent sessions.

courses.title: Cost Optimisation for AI Agents
courses.description: Minimise spend with prompt caching, context compaction, allowlist toolsets, limited networking, efficient system prompts, and org-level spend controls. Includes cost modelling for typical agent workloads.

courses.title: Enterprise Deployment Patterns
courses.description: Deploy managed agents at enterprise scale — Slack/Teams integration (Rakuten pattern), multi-department rollout, SLA management, compliance considerations, data residency limitations, and the one-week deployment playbook.

courses.title: Claude Code: The Developer CLI
courses.description: Master the Claude Code CLI — CLAUDE.md context, custom skills, MCP servers, subagents, hooks, and keybindings. The foundational tool for every Claude developer workflow.
